[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100011000 4
1 1010111111 8
2 0010101000 3
3 0001101001 4
4 1110011111 8
5 1111111110 9
6 1111110111 9
7 0111111100 7
